summary: Forward-thinking Senior Software Engineer with 8+ years of experience architecting scalable distributed systems and leading high-performance engineering teams. Proven track record of improving system performance by 40% and delivering mission-critical applications for enterprise clients.

experience.title: Senior Software Engineer
bullets: Architected a scalable microservices platform using Node.js and Kubernetes, supporting 50k+ concurrent users.
Reduced database query latency by 45% through aggressive caching and index optimization.
Mentored a team of 6 engineers, improving code review turnaround time by 30%

experience.title: Software Engineer
bullets: Developed RESTful APIs processing over 1M requests per day with 99.99% uptime.
Implemented automated CI/CD pipelines, reducing deployment time from hours to minutes.
Collaborated with product teams to design and launch 3 new core features.
